frozen_components: BERT layers (except those receiving gradients during multitask training)
architecture.summary: KnowBert inserts a Knowledge Attention and Recontextualization (KAR) component between layers of pretrained BERT to ground contextual representations in external knowledge bases. The KAR identifies entity mention spans in the input, uses a learned entity linker to retrieve relevant entity embeddings from frozen KBs, updates span representations with retrieved knowledge via residual connection, and recontextualizes all word-piece representations through word-to-entity-span attention. The entity linker is trained jointly with masked language modeling in a multitask setting using minimal entity linking supervision and large amounts of raw text.
trained_components: KAR projection layers (word-piece to entity dimension, entity dimension back to BERT dimension)
entity linker (span self-attention, disambiguation scoring MLP)
position-wise MLPs in mention-span and recontextualization transformers

claims.statement: KnowBert-W+W achieves masked LM perplexity of 3.5 compared to BERT base's 5.5
KnowBert-W+W achieves mean reciprocal rank of 0.31 on Wikidata factual recall probing task, compared to BERT base's 0.09
KnowBert-W+W achieves 71.5 F1 on TACRED relation extraction, outperforming BERT base (68.0 F1) by 3.5 percentage points
KnowBert-W+W achieves 70.9 accuracy on WiC (Words in Context), improving over BERT base (65.5) and setting state of the art
KnowBert-WordNet achieves 74.9 F1 on fine-grained word sense disambiguation (WSD), compared to BERT base's 73.1 F1

claims.dataset: batch of 32 sentence pairs, length 80 word pieces, TITAN Xp GPU
claims.statement: KnowBert-Wiki is 8% slower than BERT base and KnowBert-W+W is 32% slower, with forward/backward pass time of 0.27 and 0.33 seconds respectively compared to BERT base's 0.25 seconds
KnowBert-W+W adds 7.3 million trainable parameters in the KAR and 406 million frozen parameters in entity embeddings, compared to BERT base's 110 million parameters total

The entity linker is jointly trained end-to-end in a multitask setting combining a small amount of entity linking supervision with a large amount of raw text, allowing the method to learn general purpose knowledge-enhanced representations applicable to multiple downstream tasks without task-specific supervision
